title: Define dotnet-native validation strategy
description: Document how Roslyn analyzers, .editorconfig, dotnet format, architecture tests, integration tests, and dotnet tools replace grep-based C# checks while preserving AI reasoning context.
validation: Documented dotnet-native validation layers and shell retention policy.
Preserved AI software engineering reasoning context as separate from executable validation gates.
Defined first source-included analyzer shape and first analyzer rule families.
